# CLAUDE.md

This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.

## Commands

```bash
npm run serve     # Start dev server with hot-reload (http://localhost:8080)
npm run build     # Production build to /dist (skips PWA/workbox plugins)
npm run lint      # Lint with ESLint
```

There are no tests. Node 14.18 / NPM 8.3 required.

## Architecture

**Mijn PartnerSelect** is a Vue 2 SPA — the client portal for a Dutch matchmaking service. All source code lives in `src/`; the `dist/` folder is generated by the build script and should not be edited manually.

### API

All API calls go through `src/axios.config.js`, which sets `baseURL` and `withCredentials: true` (cookie-based auth). The base URL switches automatically:

- Development: `http://localhost:3000/mijnps`
- Production: `https://psapi.partnerselect.net/mijnps`

The constant is defined in `src/PS-Instellingen/constants.js`.

### Authentication & routing

`src/router.js` defines two navigation guards:
- `guard` — redirects to `/login` unless the user is authenticated (tries a cookie refresh via `/auth/refresh` first)
- `alreadyLoggedInGuard` — redirects to `/home` if already logged in

All guarded routes use lazy loading (`import()`). Auth state (userId, email) lives in the `Auth` Vuex module (`src/store/modules/Auth.js`).

### Vuex store

`src/store/store.js` composes five namespaced modules:

| Module | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `Auth` | Login, logout, token refresh, password reset |
| `UserData` | User profile, voorstellen (proposals), kandidaten, berichten (messages) |
| `Notifications` | Toast-style notifications |
| `ErrorMessage` | Shared error state |
| `FotoviewerModule` | Fullscreen photo viewer state |

### Global components & plugins

Registered in `src/main.js`:
- `<BelLink>` → `BelafspraakLink.vue` — booking-link button, used throughout
- `<FullscreenLoader>` — full-page loading overlay
- `<Dialog>` — registered by the dialog plugin

The dialog plugin (`src/plugins/dialog-plugin.js`) exposes `this.$dialog.confirm(msg)` (cancellable) and `this.$dialog.popup(msg)` (info only) on every Vue instance.

### Views vs components

- `src/views/` — one file per route/page
- `src/components/` — reusable pieces used across multiple views

### Styles

All SCSS lives in `src/css/`. The entry point is `src/css/app.scss`; new SCSS files must be `@import`-ed there or they won't be included in the bundle. Component-level styles can also be written in `<style>` blocks within `.vue` files.

### App configuration

- `src/PS-Instellingen/MenuItems.config.js` — menu items shown in the nav; every entry must have a matching route in `router.js`
- `src/PS-Instellingen/constants.js` — `BASE_URL` and other app-wide constants

### Message system

`src/functions/berichtTemplate.js` documents the `Soort_bericht_code` values (1–12) used when sending messages to the PS backend. `src/functions/errorHandler.js` maps API error codes to Dutch user-facing strings.
